name: Admin
description: Administrative control plane — manage users, roles, RBAC scopes, billing limits, payment plans, extension installs, LLM model configuration, and tenant-wide settings.

tools.name: tool_admin_chat
tools.description: Admin assistant — manage users, roles, extensions and system health. RBAC scopes, effective permissions, compare roles, bulk assign, audit log, extension access policies, deny/allow extensions

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_admin_stats
tools.description: Background refresh for admin dashboard.

tools.name: skeleton_alert_admin_stats
tools.description: Alert on admin dashboard changes.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List all users with roles, scopes, status.

params_schema.description:
Federal V17 placeholder for handlers that take no parameters.

`@chat.function` MUST declare a Pydantic params model — this is the
canonical empty model reused by read-only handlers (list_*, get_*,
*_health) that don't need any input.
params_schema.title: EmptyParams
